timestampSegments.en: Spoor is a quiet canvas for thinking in space.
timestampSegments.zh: 雪泥是一个安静的空间化思考画布。

timestampSegments.en: Notes connect by hand — the thought becomes visible.
timestampSegments.zh: 亲手把便签连成线，念头便落在雪泥上。

timestampSegments.en: Each note finds its form — standard, glass, minimal, neo-brut, receipt.
timestampSegments.zh: 同一张便签，五种形态，各有回响。

timestampSegments.en: Four personas read your notes — and the images linked to them.
timestampSegments.zh: 四个人格读你的便签，也读与之相连的图像。

timestampSegments.en: Select what matters. The canvas becomes a draft.
timestampSegments.zh: 选出要紧的几张，画布便写成一篇草稿。

timestampSegments.en: The article stays linked to the canvas it came from.
timestampSegments.zh: 成文之后，仍指回它落下的那片画布。
本地优先，默认只留在你的浏览器里。

timestampSegments.en: A trace of thought, left on quiet ground.
